referral.earnReward: On top of 2.5% rakeback for life, you earn instant cash rewards when your referred player level up.

faq.title_1: How much can I earn from referrals?
faq.desc_1: There's no limit to how much you can earn through referrals—you'll get 2.5% rakeback on every bet and cash rewards as they level up.
faq.desc_2: On desktop, click <0>Refer & earn</0> from the left-hand menu. On mobile, tap <0>Menu > Refer & earn.</0>
faq.title_3: Is there a minimum amount my referral needs to bet?
faq.desc_3: No, there's no minimum—you earn from every bet they place, big or small.
faq.title_4: Is there a limit to how many people I can refer?
faq.desc_4: No, there's no limit to how many people you can refer.
faq.title_5: Do the referred accounts have to be completely new?
faq.desc_5: Yes, your referrals must have never had a Cloudbet account before.
faq.title_6: If my referral didn't use my link to sign up, can I claim the referral later?
faq.desc_6: No, your referrals must sign up using your referral link.
faq.title_7: What if my referral signs up with multiple accounts?
faq.desc_7: Referrals with multiple accounts won't qualify for the referral program.

modal.hotColdTitle: What are hot and cold slots?
modal.hotColdText: Hot slots have paid out more frequently than usual. Cold slots haven't hit in a while. RTP (return to player) is how much a game typically pays back over time — a 90% RTP means $90 returned for every $100 wagered.

description.ghostMode: Username shows in chat, hidden in live feeds. Profile is hidden.
description.ghostModeOff: Username and profile are visible everywhere.
description.confirmGhostModeDescription3: Ghost Mode hides your wins and achievements, and your user profile. Your username will be hidden from Live Feed.
description.confirmGhostModeDescription4: (Your username will still be visible in the chat.)

security.newInvalid: Ο νέος κωδικός θα πρέπει να εχει τουλάχιστον 8 χαρακτήρες.
security.passwordsShouldNotBeSame: Old and new passwords should not be the same.
security.securityRecoveryCodeDesc: Keep this code in a safe place. If you lose your phone, you’ll need it to access your account and make withdrawals.
security.successfullyPassword: You have successfully updated your password.
security.successfully2fa: You've successfully set up 2FA for your account.
security.changePasswordDetailDesc: Update your password below. It must contain at least 8 characters. Using a combination of numbers, letters and special characters makes your password stronger.
security.securityGoogleAuthDesc1: Download Google Authenticator from the App Store or Google Play. Then use the code below to set up 2FA.
security.securityGoogleAuthDesc2: Or scan the QR code below using your authenticator app to link your Cloudbet account.
security.securityMfaCodeDesc: Enter the 6-digit code from your Google Authenticator mobile app.
security.disabledMfaTitle: Do you wish to disable 2FA from your account?
security.disabledMfaDesc: To disable two-factor authentication, you'll need to enter your 2FA code one last time.
security.disabledMfaSuccessDesc: You can re-enable it anytime from your security settings.
security.mfaOtpDesc1: We sent an email containing a one-time password (OTP) to this address.
security.mfaOtpDesc2: If you do not receive the email within a few minutes, please check your spam folder.

signUp.usernameInvalid: Username has to have 3-15 characters and can only contain: letters a-Z, numbers, "-", "_"
signUp.overLegalAgeAndReadTerms: By continuing, you confirm to be at least 18 years old, and that you have read and agree to our <0>Terms & Conditions</0>

signUp.emailDomainNotPermitted: Email domain not permitted, please use different email address

verification.somethingWentWrongDescription: Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
verification.verificationPendingNote:
You can close this window now.
Verification might take some time.
verification.verifyInTelegramDescription: We've sent a message to your Telegram. <0></0>Open Telegram and tap <1>"Share phone number"</1> to complete verification. <0></0>Didn't get the message? Make sure you haven't blocked <2>@CloudbetOfficialBot</2>.
verification.sendTelegramFailDescription: We couldn't reach you on Telegram. <0></0>Please check that <1>@CloudbetOfficialBot</1> is unblocked and try again.
verification.verificationV2Subtext: Verifying your identity keeps your account secure and your access seamless.
verification.enterYourPhoneNumberToReceiveVerificatio: Enter your phone number to receive a verification code.
verification.enterTheDigitCodeWeSentTo: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {{phoneNumber}}
verification.preIdentityVerificationMessage: Before you start, have your <0>ID</0> and <0>proof of address</0> ready to speed things up. The list of accepted documents can be found <1>here</1>.
verification.identityVerificationUnderReviewMessage: Your ID verification is under review. This usually takes just a few minutes.
verification.identityVerificationErrorMessage: Your ID verification couldn’t be completed due to missing or incorrect information. Visit our <0>support page</0> for help, then restart your verification.
verification.identityVerificationRejectedMessage: Your ID verification was not approved after review. For security reasons, your account remains restricted until your identity can be confirmed. Please contact <0>customer support</0> to review your options.
verification.verificationCompleteDescription: You’re all set. Your account is now verified and protected, with full access to Cloudbet rewards and features.
verification.enjoyFasterPayoutsSaferPlayAndNoLimitsBy: Enjoy faster payouts, safer play, and no limits by verifying your account.
verification.verificationTakeoverDescription: Verification gives you stronger security and fraud protection, faster unlimited withdrawals, and access to every feature and VIP perk on Cloudbet.

upsellVipOffer.title: Unlock custom VIP rewards
upsellVipOffer.body: Chat with your dedicated VIP manager to discover tailored experiences and exclusive offers crafted just for you.

withdrawal.restrictedCountryV2: You’re connecting from a <0>prohibited jurisdiction</0>.<1></1> Withdrawing from your current location will restrict your account to withdrawals only and lock it once all balances are withdrawn. To address restrictions or get help with withdrawal, <2>Contact Support</2>.
withdrawal.restrictedCountryAmountWarning: Your account is restricted due to your location. You must withdraw the full balance.
withdrawal.noWithdrawCurrency: You have no currencies to withdraw.
withdrawal.success: Η ανάληψή σας βρίσκεται σε εξέλιξη. Παρακαλώ σημειώστε πως μπορεί να χρειαστούν έως 24 ώρες μέχρι οι αναλήψεις να πραγματοποιηθούν.
withdrawal.failedToCancelWithdrawal: We failed to cancel your withdrawal request, please try again.

withdrawal.pleaseUseNewAddress: Please make sure to use your new address when depositing to avoid lost funds.

depositPending.description: Please wait until your deposit has 3 network confirmation(s) before withdrawing.

fullBalanceRequired.description: Due to account restrictions, please withdraw your entire balance.

genericError.title: Something went wrong

referral.referralInfoDesc3: Get a cut of <0>every eligible bet</0> your referral places.

promoCode.submittedDescription: We're verifying your code now. You'll get an inbox message within 10-30 minutes with your credit or next steps (like completing KYC).

selfExclusion.cooloffActivatedTime: You've activated a cool-off period lasting <0>{{timeBetween}}</0>, starting from <0>{{date}}</0>.
selfExclusion.cooloffActivatedInfo: During this time, access to all casino games and sports betting is temporarily locked. You will be able to play again once the cool-off period ends on <0>{{date}}</0>.
selfExclusion.coolOffActiveBanner: Cool-off period active until {{date}}. Betting is disabled.

playThrough.youMustCompleteYourPlaythroughBeforeYouR: You must complete your playthrough before you're eligible to withdraw this currency.
playThrough.visitOurSupportArticle: Visit our <0>support article</0> to learn more.

welcomeBonus.welcomeOneDescription: Earn cash every time you place a bet! When you claim your cash, it will be added to your 'Earned' balance and deducted from 'Remaining.'
welcomeBonus.welcomeTwoDescription: Place bets to earn Rakeback and a daily cash drop based on your activity. Log in everyday to claim your rewards! (Sports bets will only earn cash once they are settled.)
welcomeBonus.welcomeThreeDescription: When you claim your cash, part of it goes straight to your wallet. The rest is added to your Rewards Calendar. Log in regularly to check your calendar and claim available rewards!
welcomeBonus.welcomeFourDescription: Complete your Welcome Package to unlock the cash Vault—your biggest reward yet! Plus, you'll gain access to Cloudbet Rewards, featuring level-up bonuses, weekly and monthly cash drops, and other exciting perks.
welcomeBonus.upcomingRewardDescription: Complete your Welcome Package to unlock these exclusive rewards.
welcomeBonus.upcomingRewardCashVault: Opened when you unlock Cloudbet Rewards.
welcomeBonus.upcomingRewardLevelUps: Cash paid as you progress to each new level.
welcomeBonus.upcomingRewardTurbo: Gives you TURBO-charged rakeback every time you claim a reward.
welcomeBonus.upcomingRewardWeekly: Extra cash drops every week, on top of your daily rewards.
welcomeBonus.upcomingRewardMonthly: Extra cash drops every month, on top of your weekly rewards.

vipRewards.tutorialProgressDescriptionDeposit: Deposit to fill the bar and earn rewards. Track progress here. Simple as that.
vipRewards.tutorialProgressDescriptionWager: Place bets to fill the bar. The cash is yours when the bar is full. Simple as that.
vipRewards.tutorialProgressDescriptionAll: Deposit and bet to fill the bars and unlock rewards. Reach your goals and claim your cash. The bars will reset for more rewards until you claim the full offer.
vipRewards.tutorialRankDescription: You earned an exclusive upgrade to this tier based on past betting. Everything you need to know about the perks — and climbing higher — is here.
vipRewards.tutorialRewardsDescription: Cloudbet Rewards come fast and often, but all you need to do is log in regularly to claim your cash.

betting.acceptOddsChangesDescriptions: You can accelerate the pace of placing your bet by accepting odds changes.
